# Raw Data Expansion Roadmap

This Results-First Edition begins from processed proteomics results.

A future Raw Data Edition can expand backward into raw mass spectrometry processing.

## Future Expansion

```text
RAW files
        ↓
spectral processing
        ↓
peptide identification
        ↓
protein inference
        ↓
protein quantification
        ↓
differential abundance analysis
        ↓
results-first interpretation workflow
```

## Possible Future Topics

- MaxQuant
- FragPipe
- DIA-NN
- Spectronaut-style outputs
- peptide-spectrum matches
- protein inference
- label-free quantification
- TMT/iTRAQ workflows
